Here's the question:

What is the name of the angle formed by two intersecting lines that is greater than 90 degrees?

Options:
  A. Acute angle
  B. Right angle
  C. Obtuse angle
  D. Straight angle

I think an obtuse angle is... um... isn't it the same as a right angle? No, wait, that can't be right... I'm pretty sure an obtuse angle is bigger than a right angle...

My answer is: C. Obtuse angle

I'm choosing this one because I think obtuse means bigger, and a bigger angle would be greater than 90 degrees... I hope!
